replenishment_policy.instruction: EVERY run you MUST add 2-3 new todo tasks to agent_tasks.json, regardless of how many already exist. Read docs/trends.md and search the internet for current AI agent trends before generating tasks. Tasks should be inspired by what top agents (Hermes, OpenClaw, Claude Code, etc.) are doing NOW — not by outdated 2020-era patterns. Never let the pool stagnate. If you cannot search the internet, use docs/trends.md as your source of inspiration.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task that is not blocked by high/critical risk. If the first todo task is too large, create smaller prerequisite tasks and select the first prerequisite.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask the user for the next task while safe low/medium-risk tasks can be generated from architecture docs, failing CI, TODO comments, or repeated errors.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, prioritize a fix task for the failure before starting new features.

tasks.title: Document target cognitive architecture
tasks.description: Create a project-level architecture document that maps biological concepts to engineering contracts and defines the Jules self-improvement governance model.
acceptance: docs/cognitive_architecture.md exists
agent_tasks.json validates with scripts/validate_agent_tasks.py

tasks.title: Validate agent task manifest
tasks.description: Add a stdlib-only validator for agent_tasks.json and tests that prevent malformed tasks, unknown risk levels, missing acceptance criteria and invalid path scopes.
acceptance: python scripts/validate_agent_tasks.py agent_tasks.json
pytest tests/test_agent_tasks.py

tasks.title: Document Jules autonomous operating loop
tasks.description: Define how Jules selects tasks, replenishes the queue, handles failures, avoids clarification stalls and keeps PRs small.
acceptance: docs/jules_autonomous_loop.md exists
agent_tasks.json includes autonomous_loop_policy
task queue defines concrete stabilization work before larger cognitive modules

tasks.title: Add Codex worker plan and bridge CLI
tasks.description: Document how Magda should work through Codex and add a stdlib-only CLI that lets Codex validate the task manifest, inspect queue status, fetch the next task and render focused prompts.
acceptance: AGENTS.md describes Codex/Jules repo instructions
docs/codex_worker_plan.md exists
python -m magda_agent.codex_bridge validate works
python -m magda_agent.codex_bridge next-task prints the next todo task
python -m magda_agent.codex_bridge render-prompt renders a scoped task prompt

tasks.title: Add focused tests for Codex bridge CLI
tasks.description: Cover the stdlib-only Codex bridge commands so task selection, prompt rendering and queue status remain stable.
acceptance: status reports total todo count and replenishment flag
next-task returns the first todo task
render-prompt includes task id, allowed paths and acceptance criteria
validate command delegates to scripts/validate_agent_tasks.py

tasks.title: Add Codex worker skill in prompt-only mode
tasks.description: Expose a safe skill that renders a Codex-ready task prompt without launching external Codex processes or creating PRs.
acceptance: codex_worker skill accepts optional task_id
skill returns a prompt generated from agent_tasks.json
skill does not execute shell commands or network calls
skill metadata marks it as low side-effect prompt-only capability

tasks.title: Add Codex PR review prompt renderer
tasks.description: Create a renderer that turns a PR diff summary into a Codex/CriticAgent review prompt focused on regressions, risks and missing tests.
acceptance: renderer accepts PR title, changed files and diff summary
prompt asks for findings first, ordered by severity
prompt includes risk and missing-test sections
renderer is deterministic and does not call external APIs

tasks.title: Add task claim and lock fields for multiple workers
tasks.description: Extend agent_tasks.json schema so Jules, Codex and future workers do not accidentally take the same task at the same time.
acceptance: tasks may include claimed_by and claimed_at fields
validator rejects stale or malformed claim metadata when present
codex_bridge status shows claimed tasks
task selection can skip active claims unless explicitly overridden

tasks.title: Make skill imports cross-platform
tasks.description: Prevent Linux-only sandbox dependencies from breaking import of magda_agent.skills on Windows or other non-Linux developer environments.
acceptance: import magda_agent.skills does not fail when resource is unavailable
Linux sandbox behavior remains unchanged where resource/preexec_fn are available
non-Linux fallback returns a clear unsupported or restricted execution result instead of import-time crash

tasks.title: Bound EmotionalEngine history
tasks.description: Replace unbounded emotion history growth with a bounded structure so the 24/7 agent does not leak memory through PAD history.
acceptance: EmotionalEngine history has a configurable maximum length
existing PAD update and decay behavior remains compatible
long-running updates do not grow history without bound

tasks.title: Add max steps and timeouts to plan execution
tasks.description: Prevent Consciousness.process_input from blocking indefinitely on long LLM-generated plans or slow skills.
acceptance: plan execution has a maximum step count
each skill execution has a timeout or explicit bounded execution path
user receives a graceful partial-result response when a plan is stopped by limits
existing simple chat flow remains compatible

tasks.title: Validate LLM-generated plans before execution
tasks.description: Add structured validation for planner output so unknown skills, malformed skill_kwargs and unsafe plans are rejected before execution.
acceptance: planner rejects non-list JSON
planner rejects steps without description/skill/skill_kwargs shape
planner rejects unknown skill names before execution
planner keeps safe no-skill chat steps valid

tasks.title: Separate mutable agent state by user
tasks.description: Prevent emotional state, short-term memory and attachment dynamics from leaking between users in the FastAPI singleton service.
acceptance: different user_id values do not share emotional PAD state unintentionally
short-term memory retrieval remains user-aware
attachment state has a persistence or explicit reset strategy
anonymous users still work with a default isolated context

tasks.title: Make Subconsciousness stop promptly
tasks.description: Replace long sleep-only shutdown behavior with an asyncio.Event or equivalent so background reflection can stop promptly during service shutdown.
acceptance: stop wakes the background loop without waiting for the full interval
start/stop remains idempotent enough for tests
existing reflection behavior remains compatible

tasks.title: Implement Amygdala/RiskSystem for change classification
tasks.description: Create a risk classifier that scores file changes and action requests before tool execution or auto-merge decisions.
acceptance: changes to workflows are high risk
changes to requirements are high risk
docs-only changes are low risk
sandbox and skill registry changes are high risk

tasks.title: Implement Salience Network
tasks.description: Add a module that scores events by urgency, active task relevance, CI/test signal, uncertainty, novelty and risk.
acceptance: noisy low-value input receives low salience
failed CI event receives high salience
security-risk event receives high salience
Consciousness can use salience without changing public API

tasks.title: Introduce Global Workspace
tasks.description: Refactor the central cognitive loop so multiple candidate events compete for focus before memory retrieval, planning and action selection.
acceptance: workspace selects highest-salience candidate
suppressed candidates remain inspectable
existing /process API behavior remains compatible
planner still receives the focused user input

tasks.title: Implement Procedural Memory
tasks.description: Implement a Procedural Memory module to store reusable successful procedures.
acceptance: Procedural memory stores reusable successful methods
Existing user_id filtering remains supported

tasks.title: Split memory into working, episodic, semantic and procedural layers
tasks.description: Reduce confusion between MemorySystem.long_term, LongTermMemory and habit storage by introducing explicit memory layer contracts.

episodic memory stores events
semantic memory stores stable project/user facts

tasks.title: Upgrade Subconsciousness into structured consolidation

tasks.title: Add longitudinal quality metrics for Jules loop

tasks.title: Upgrade Prefrontal Cortex to output typed plans
tasks.description: The current planner returns loose JSON steps. Upgrade it to output typed plans with explicit risk and acceptance criteria as defined in cognitive_architecture.md.

tasks.title: Add context summarization to Working Memory limit

tasks.title: Context Engine with plugin lifecycle hooks

tasks.title: Sub-agent spawning for parallel tasks

tasks.title: Policy layer for all tool/action execution

tasks.title: Cross-session conversation continuity

tasks.title: Implement Agent Guardrails Policy Layer
tasks.description: Introduce a runtime governance layer that intercepts all tool calls with external effects before execution. Evaluates the action against a set of safety policies (e.g., read-only assertions). Inspired by MCPKernel and Microsoft ASSERT.

tasks.title: Three-agent architecture separation

tasks.title: Realtime guardrail fallback

Tests verify the fallback path is executed
